title: Floor Squeegee Heavy Duty, 60CM Large Floor Squeegee Broom with 150CM Long Handle, Floor Scraper Rubber Broom for Garage, Tile, Deck, Bathroom,Outdoor,Window, Glass
features: Durable Rubber Blade: The floor squeegee is strong and durable, able to withstand multiple use without breaking or bending, effectively removing water, dirt and light attachments from the floor,60cm/23.6 inch rubber blade with soft edge, can be used to clean larger stains and debris on the ground.

Longer Handle: Our window cleaning equipment can reach 150cm (60 inches). When using the squeegee, no need to bend down to sweep the floor, making your cleaning easier and more convenient.The longer handle also provides a better grip, making it easier to use in a variety of situations, such as in the shower or when cleaning the sides of a sink.

Lightweight & Comfortable for Use: The lightweight and efficient design of the swimming pool squeegee can quickly and effectively scrape off stubborn stains,cement residues, etc. on the ground. The handle design conforms to ergonomics, so you will not feel too tired even after long-term use, and it is easy to control the strength and direction.

Easy To Use and Clean: This squeegee broom is easy to hold and use, comfortable to hold, and has a good cleaning effect. It is very convenient for home use cleaning tools. It can be used on various surfaces and can effectively remove water and other liquids. After use, just clean the debris from the scraper and rinse the blade with water, and it can be used.

Multifunctional Application: Our squeegee floor suitable for a variety of floor materials, including tiles, wooden floors, concrete, carpet edges, etc. Squeegee is suitable for cleaning garages, tiles, decks, bathrooms, kitchen floors, and can meet the needs of families and professionals
